mission: Restructure and rewrite mvp-build as a compact, machine-readable, repository-search-native and experiment-calibrated agentic engineering environment without changing working runtime behavior or promoting evidence classes.

bound.Goal: one authority system, one active production plan, compact contributor routers, machine-readable topology, preserved provenance and executable drift detection
NonGoals: provider, target-host, pilot, deployment or production acceptance
claims about neural latent state or hidden reasoning
bound.EvidenceBoundary: tracked repository state at starting_sha plus independently retrieved primary research; later CI is a distinct evidence class
bound.MaximumPatch: documentation, repository interface, decision tooling, path-safe tests and workflow references required for one coherent mvp-build information-architecture transaction

unknowns: which historical paths require compatibility routers
whether DPP, spectral, MCTS or Koopman layers add decision utility
prohibitions: no non-trace restructure before inventory is generated and committed
no Unknown value is coerced to zero or confidence
no representation is reported as proof
no mathematical layer is causal without equal-feasibility implementation ablation
no runtime move without reverse-reference and execution-path evidence
